## Testing

## Safety

- [ ] No Moodle tokens, private iCal URLs, passwords, or `.clasp.json` contents are included.
- [ ] Changes only affect synced Moodle events, not personal calendar events.
- [ ] README/setup instructions are updated if user-facing behavior changed.
